title: lamium longiflorum subsp. corsicum
intro: Lamium longiflorum subsp. corsicum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the spiny dead-nettle, characterized by its distinctive spiny stems and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lamium longiflorum subsp. corsicum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
